'''Rebeton Kl'ian''' was a large [[Droid/Legends|droid]] manufacturing corporation. It was considered to be a giant in the business alongside [[Industrial Automaton/Legends|Industrial Automaton]], [[Cybot Galactica/Legends|Cybot Galactica]], and [[Arakyd Industries/Legends|Arakyd Industries]]..
